luvs,

ngl this was og intended for wlw like i had that mindset -- ofc it's anypov as always, but she is MINE and we are a gay couple 😁. i'm really excited to see how we feel about her. I know I don't make a ton of female bots anymore but those were all I used to make when I first started so i kind of want to get back to that and in the end of the day, i make these for me just to be silly and have fun so... yeah.

u are all amazing and i luv u so much and even if u hate my bots pls like me i'm a people pleaser ☹️

anyway... i almost immediately strayed from who i had planned next! i flipped vday 3 and 4 bc i really like anari :D thats all thats the reason

Sending love <3. Don't forget to get head on Valentine's for good luck (I know I will) 😘

MIKRA
